jobName: PL52688 115x77mm DUOMAX 4000 B12+Se 500mL Labels (1000) Sequential Numbering
lineDescription: PL52688 105x70mm DUOMAX 4000 B12+Se 500mL Labels (1000) Sequential Numbering Size: 105mm x 70mm (Digital Cut) Material: PP60 - Permanent Print Colour: CMYK Finishing: TTV Provided on 76mm Cores Hand/Machine Applied: MACHINE APPLIED Supply: Sequential numbering to start from 0001 for each order of this Label Qty: 1000 ***ALWAYS INCLUDE SAMPLES ON OUTSIDE OF BOX*** ***Resellers Discount Applied*** For each roll - Numbering on the backing paper with consecutive sequence; the label closest to the core will be the lowest number ie: 1 Roll direction NUMBER 3, inner cone diameter is 76mm and an outer cone diameter is 81mm MOD 250mm
